title: realistic planks
description: CC0 textures from poly haven that are replacing various planks
body:
Credits: I (Warer) dont own the texture it was made by: Charlotte Baglioni and Dario Barresi 
texture is from Poly haven website called: Laminate Floor 02 license is CC0 I dont have any connection to these people. 

I am sharing this in good faith because I really like how the texture looks.

shaders used for screenshots :Photon

CC0 Texture is from : https://polyhaven.com/a/laminate_floor_02


![Laminate Floor 02](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IFoOrgoq/images/e1d209b5984f788d7494c849126517454d68fe2a.png)


donation link has no connection to me (Warer) and is pointed to poly haven patreon in case you want to support them

License from poly haven website: https://polyhaven.com/license

text from license: 
(You can redistribute them, share them around, include them when sharing your own work)

The textures have been modified to fit the minecraft size x512x512 also to fit the screenshot size limit 5mb the resoultion has been lowered to below 1920x1080. if you want higher quality texture then you should visit poly haven. (what you see on screenshot does not show the full quality that is on poly haven.

another modification is to make the texture connect with each other as block better using seamless texture example.

the max distance to view the texture is 4 blocks so its not good for any far away builds.


if for some reasons the authors want this texture gone contact me and I will respect their choice and delete this "resource pack".

the texture is CC0 but if you want to credit anybody dont credit me (Warer) and instead credit Charlotte Baglioni and Dario Barresi and other authors mentioned in here.



Mangrove planks texture is from https://polyhaven.com/a/dirty_tiles
made by:
Jenelle van Heerden and Matterfield

same modifications and same license.


Iron block texture is from https://polyhaven.com/a/blue_metal_plate
made by: 
Rob Tuytel 

same modifications and same license. (used grey version not blue)


lime_wool (change name to whatever plank you want this texture to replace) texture is from https://polyhaven.com/a/worn_mossy_plasterwall
made by:
Amal Kumar
same modifications and same license. (x1024)



Dark Planks texture is from:
https://polyhaven.com/a/dark_planks 
made by:
Rob Tuytel
same modifications and same license. 
(10 different colors but its the same texture, use photon shaders for better color vibrance)

change the name to whatever plank you want Dark_planks (or its color variant) to replace you can also use these textures to replace biomes of plenty planks. (just copy paste them into mod.zip)


Wooden Rough Planks texture is from:
https://polyhaven.com/a/wooden_rough_planks
made by:
Rob Tuytel
same modifications and same license.
(replaces bamboo planks)




Stone Pathway texture is from: 
https://polyhaven.com/a/stone_pathway
made by: Amal Kumar
same modifications and same license
(change name to whatever plank you want this texture to replace)

Rock Wall texture is from:
https://polyhaven.com/a/rock_wall_03
made by: Dario Barresi and Charlotte Baglioni
same modifications and same license
(change name to whatever plank you want this texture to replace)

Patio Tiles texture is from:
https://polyhaven.com/a/patio_tiles
made by: Dario Barresi
same modifications and same license
(change name to whatever plank you want this texture to replace)


Square Cobblestone texture is from:
https://polyhaven.com/a/square_cobblestone
made by: bSơn Nguyễn
same modifications and same license
(change name to whatever plank you want this texture to replace)


dirt texture is from:
https://polyhaven.com/a/gravel
made by: Dimitrios Savva
same modifications and same license
